violations.text: The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in various areas (electrical cabinet/chemical room, under dry storage, near 3 bay sink, shelf under prep unit). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelf under the prep unit was observed with rodent droppings. PIC cleaned/sanitized area during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The following areas were observed in poor repair: - corner molding missing near cashier and office areas, - foam seal in electrical cabinet (hole), - metal molding/coving near walk-in cooler entrance The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC cleaned areas during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC refilled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the chemical room and 3 bay sink area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - lowboy units - side of equipment/outlets between flame grill and prep area (heavy grease buildup) - Prep table shelves Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
Inspector observed dumpsters overflowing with a heavy accumulation of filled trash bags and empty boxes outside dumpsters. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
The walk-in unit fan cover has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The following was observed in poor repair. - tile coving missing in side storage area. - corner molding missing near cashier and office areas. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table bottom shelves, hot hold units and shelves, and cup holder) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The (wall ) in the (water heater ) area is in poor repair. Observed a hole in wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep unit bottom shelves and equipment) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The floors throughout kitchen, back storage, and walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the (single service shelf ) area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Inspector observed gnawed marks and droppings on bags of bread.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnawed food product and droppings in kitchen and storage rooms ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves and equipment ) have an accumulation of soil residue, food residue, other debris, and or rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Inspector a leak at plumbing under the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2025

The floors throughout the kitchen, back storage areas, and walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Inspector observed rodent gnawed and droppings on bags of bread. PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnawed food product and rodent droppings). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves under prep line)) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The floors throughout the kitchen, back storage, and front counter areas have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, grease buildup, and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The (wall ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed damaged tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on top single service items. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a ladder and bread crates. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Items relocated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
The 3 bay sink and kitchen area is lacking adequate lighting. Blown light bulbs and flickering lights observed during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The presence of flies are not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves and counters have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of water, soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Registration with RIDOH must take place. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC provided paper towel roll during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

Food contact surfaces of ice machine was observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the fry freezer and storage shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
The faucet at the 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. Inspector observed a leak at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
The refuse area was observed with an accumulation of trash and debris. PIC informed to clean and maintain area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
